profile.name: Muksudul Islam
profile.title: Junior Software QA Engineer
profile.summary: Detail-oriented Junior SQA Engineer with 2+ years of hands-on experience testing web, mobile, and REST API layers across healthcare platforms. Proven track record contributing to 9+ projects, reducing post-release defects by 95% and bug resolution time by 75%. Experienced in agile squad environments, test automation with Cypress and Selenium, and performance testing with JMeter.

responsibilities: Collaborated with a 10-member QA team across agile ceremonies
Supported 4+ healthcare products including OpenMRS-based systems
Executed 300+ test cases across web, mobile, and REST API layers
Conducted API, Regression, Smoke, Sanity, and Performance Testing
Reported 120+ defects with detailed reproduction steps in Jira
Worked closely with developers to achieve 95% defect reduction
Managed infrastructure systems alongside QA responsibilities
Conducted Functional and Regression Testing on web applications
Performed Mobile and iOS Testing across healthcare platforms
Designed test cases aligned with acceptance criteria
Assisted in Bug Triage support and defect life-cycle management

featured_projects.name: dmoney API Automation
featured_projects.description: End-to-end automated API test suite for the dmoney payment platform using Postman collections and Newman CLI runner with HTML reports and CI integration.

featured_projects.name: Random User API Performance Test
featured_projects.description: JMeter performance testing suite for the Random User public API with load, stress, and endurance test plans, featuring threshold assertions and HTML dashboard reports.

featured_projects.name: OrangeHRM Web Automation
featured_projects.description: Full Selenium WebDriver automation framework for OrangeHRM using Java, TestNG, and Page Object Model design pattern with cross-browser support and parallel execution.

featured_projects.name: SauceDemo Playwright Suite
featured_projects.description: Modern Playwright automation framework for SauceDemo e-commerce app using JavaScript with POM architecture, fixtures, and visual regression assertions.
